---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for vessel
title: 'feat: [Brief description of the feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### 🔗 Is your feature request related to a specific issue?
Please briefly describe the origin of this feature request.

---

### 💡 Feature Description
Explain in detail what you want to add or improve, including:
- Expected outcome
- Specific implementation ideas
- Usage scenarios or benefits

---

### ⚖ Alternatives Considered
List other approaches you tried or considered, and explain why they are not ideal.

---

### 📝 Additional Information
Provide any extra background, design sketches, or code snippets that help explain the request.
